标题: The Descente allterrain 81 high-end series is a premium outdoor sports line launched by DESCENTE, blending professional functionality with urban aesthetics, targeting consumers who seek a combination of outdoor sports and fashion. It features optimized shoulder lines and three-dimensional contour design to balance freedom of movement and layering possibilities, with details such as adjustable zippers and hidden waistbands for added convenience. Balancing outdoor protection and commuting wear, some styles reduce color brightness, optimize cutting precision, and blur the boundaries between professional gear and fashion items.

DESCENTE's TRAINING series J31 down jacket is part of the brand's collection focused on comprehensive training. The series combines sports technology with fashion aesthetics, aiming to provide consumers with sports gear that balances professional functionality and stylish design.

DESCENTE D-SUN spliced knitted sleeve down jacket. Light and warm down, new fashion trend "new generation light down". Stylish and inclusive cut for a slimmer look, seamless lock-stitching technology, drop-shoulder sleeve design, high-quality silicone logo. Comfortable and lightweight to wear, overturning traditional heavy down jackets. Fashionable style for all seasons, providing warmth and companionship. Colors: pink, khaki, black, white, black. Sizes: S, M, L, XL, XXL, XXXL, XXXXL.

DSquared x Maserati collaboration seamless pressed down jacket. The entire piece is made using seamless pressed technology, effectively preventing down leakage while enhancing insulation and reducing weight. Filled with 90% white duck down for optimal warmth. Weighing only 553g, it provides exceptional warmth. Does lighter weight mean poorer insulation? The Maserati collaboration down jacket dispels this notion with its high-tech craftsmanship and lofty white duck down. Utilizing ultra-light microfiber fabric, it ensures long-lasting comfort without feeling heavy.

Descente x Audi collaboration 2nd generation down jacket in black. Featuring water-repellent technology fabric and 95% high-fill down for warmth and water resistance, perfect for outdoor winter wear. With a windproof stand collar, Swiss ski team and Audi logos on the chest and sleeves, exuding a sporty vibe with full collaboration branding. Unisex design with a neutral and practical style suitable for commuting or skiing, combining functionality and fashion. A must-have for winter outfits!

Descente 2024 Fall/Winter new Seoul edition long over-the-knee hooded down coat with color block design for men and women. Descente 2022 Winter same style down coat as worn by Wu Yanzu, outshining other products on the market. This long down coat, highly sought-after couple's style on the platform, is a must-have this winter. Filled with over 400 grams of down in size S, featuring 90% white duck down for exceptional warmth. Unbeatable value for money, perfect for the streets, looking stylish on both men and women. Inner and outer layers made of waterproof material, suitable for outdoor wear in winter. Hood not detachable, available in black and white colors in sizes S-XXL. Officially on sale at w3390, exclusive in-stock items, don't miss out on this real deal! Product name: DS long down coat.

Descente half-zip knit sweater, a perfect blend of fashion and warmth. This embroidered knit piece is a must-have treasure in your early spring wardrobe. The delicate and soft knit fabric feels comfortable against the skin, like being wrapped in a gentle cloud, providing the most tender care. Its outstanding warmth performance ensures you stay cozy even in the cold wind. The embroidery is a highlight, with exquisite stitching bringing the letters to life, adding a unique personality and sense of fashion to the overall look. Whether styled casually or elegantly, this sweater is versatile and will make you stand out in the crowd, becoming a fashion focal point. Available in sizes M-XXL.

Descente autumn/winter new classic couple round neck sweatshirt and sweatpants set. Made of composite flannel fabric, smooth surface, very stylish when worn. Moderate thickness, elastic drawstring waist with hidden drawstring on the inside, practical and aesthetically pleasing. Can be paired with any shoes, very good quality. Sizes available: M-3XL.

Descente's 2025SS autumn/winter new printed round-neck long-sleeve T-shirt embodies minimalist design and exquisite details. With a unique style that highlights minimalist design, this brand, known for its pursuit of design and tailoring craftsmanship, never disappoints in terms of materials. Made with a blend of 400g Solona cotton, the fabric is luxurious and delicate, with a full and soft cotton texture. Sizes available: 48-56.

Descente mountain outdoor windproof and waterproof jacket series with hood, featuring anti-static, lightweight, and improved windproof and breathable properties for enhanced comfort. It allows for flexible movement and keeps you warm during high-intensity workouts in non-extreme weather conditions. Sizes available: M-3XL.

Descente summer new men's outdoor leisure ice silk quick-drying sun protection skin jacket! A must-have style for daily wear. Comfortable, breathable, and multifunctional! The fabric is sun-protective, quick-drying, and highly breathable with a strong cooling sensation. This professional lightweight sun protection skin jacket is highly favored for its extreme lightness, quick sweat absorption, and enhanced comfort. The fabric's functionality is strong, with noticeable moisture-wicking effects, keeping the body dry and light even during intense exercise in hot conditions. It is several times more breathable than regular fabrics, adding a touch of high-end elegance to the overall simple and atmospheric style. The fabric stays dry and is more durable, sweat-absorbent without sticking to the body, and maintains its shape even after machine washing. The tailored cut fits well, with a stand-up collar design for a more youthful and fashionable look. This skin jacket is extremely versatile, suitable for sun protection, leisure, outdoor running, and fitness. Sizes available: M-XXL.
